title: Côn Đảo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Côn Đảo with a Z-Score of +3.51. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Côn Đảo is at a critical level, with a Z-Score of +3.51 indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The city is experiencing high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.3 GG, and high humidity at 80%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 18.2 km/h, but it is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Operational measures are required to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
